subcodes.first_line: We summon the nations unto the Dayspring of Eternity and announce unto the world this Name through which the seal of the choice Wine of everlasting life hath been broken and hearts have been drawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ندع الامم الی مطلع القدم و نبشر العالم بهذا الاسم الذی به فک ختم رحیق البقآء و انجذب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
